ogTitle: Ettrick vs Euabalong West: Climate Safety

heading: Ettrick vs Euabalong West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ettrick, New South Wales and Euabalong West, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ettrick has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Euabalong West (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ettrick or Euabalong West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ettrick has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Euabalong West scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ettrick scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Euabalong West scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ettrick or Euabalong West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ettrick has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
